annotation.summary: The declared source version is current and no formal file was changed. During reference discovery, one overly broad search emitted matching paths and line snippets under SeparationLogic/examples/QCP_demos_human/**. The repository annotation contract treats touching QCP_demos_human reference input as a hard blocker, even when no denied content is adopted.

canonical_symexec_evidence.reason: The denied-reference hard blocker occurred before a candidate could be edited and validated.

qcp_mcp_interactive_evidence.reason: No candidate was eligible for interactive validation after the denied-reference hard blocker.

blockers.reason: A broad search emitted paths and line snippets under QCP_demos_human, which the repository annotation contract explicitly treats as a blocker.
blockers.recommended_action: Controller should reject this attempt and create a fresh annotation round. The new round must constrain all searches to declared allowed globs and may reuse only evidence explicitly authorized by its new handoff.

timing.timing_gap: Rule reading, source inspection, reference discovery, and report preparation were not recorded by an external incremental activity ledger and are not estimated.
